summary: MiroFish integration into Auto Scanner verified end-to-end. Backend: 6/6 pytest cases PASSED in test_auto_scan_mirofish.py (signals shape, MiroFish present, other strategies alongside, cache faster on 2nd call, invalid ticker graceful). Frontend: News popup auto-appears on stock select; SCANNER tab shows '10 strategies' info text and MiroFish chip highlighted in teal (#00BCD4); after START, scanner result includes MiroFish (BULLISH) BUY signal alongside SMC (BULLISH) BUY and AMDS (BEARISH) SELL with Entry/SL/T1/T2/T3 and confidence rendered. Caching observed: first /api/auto-scan/RELIANCE.NS ~2.18s vs cached ~0.09s.
passed_tests: GET /api/auto-scan/RELIANCE.NS - 200, returns signals list with MiroFish (BULLISH) BUY conf=70 alongside SMC (BULLISH) BUY conf=75 and AMDS (BEARISH) SELL conf=43
Auto-scan signal schema: every signal has strategy, direction (BUY/SELL), entry, stoploss, targets[], confidence
Non-MiroFish strategies present in same response (SMC + AMDS)
MiroFish caching: 1st call 2.18s -> 2nd call 0.09s (5-min cache hit)
Frontend: Search 'RELIANCE' -> click RELIANCE.NS result -> News popup auto-appears
Frontend SCANNER tab text contains '10 strategies'
Frontend MiroFish strategy chip class includes bg-[#00BCD4]/15 text-[#00BCD4] (teal highlight)
Frontend START auto-scanner -> rendered cards include MiroFish (BULLISH) BUY Entry 1361.2 SL 1320.36 T1 1402.04 T2 1429.26 T3 1470.1 conf 70%
Frontend SCANNER concurrently renders SMC (BULLISH) BUY and AMDS (BEARISH) SELL cards
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~5492 lines - exceeds 700-line cap; recommend extracting scanner strategies (run_mini_*, run_full_smc_analysis, run_full_amds_analysis, _run_mirofish_for_scanner) into services/scanner_strategies.py module.

_run_mirofish_for_scanner uses asyncio.wait_for(timeout=25) which is good. However the broad 'except (asyncio.TimeoutError, Exception)' silently swallows all errors - log includes warning but consider differentiating cache miss vs timeout vs LLM JSON parse error.

cache_storage is in-process dict; cache_storage[mf_cache_key] in MiroFish scan uses dict-of-dicts format ({'data': ..., 'ts': ...}) but ghost_scan uses tuple format ((data, time)) at line 3889 - inconsistent cache schema in the same file can cause confusion / future bugs.
Auto-scan ticker_obj = yf.Ticker(ticker) is a blocking call inside an async endpoint; under load this will block the event loop. Wrap in asyncio.to_thread() or use httpx with yfinance alternative.

MiroFish LLM JSON parse (json.loads(cleaned)) has no fallback - if GPT returns malformed JSON, ValueError propagates and is caught by the broad except, silently dropping the signal. Add try/except with logged warning.
Cache TTL stored as datetime.now(timezone.utc) for MiroFish but datetime.now() (naive) elsewhere in ghost_scan - mixing aware/naive datetimes could raise TypeError if logic is unified later.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows: news popup, scanner tab text, MiroFish teal chip, auto-scan signals with MiroFish + SMC + AMDS)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live yfinance data for RELIANCE.NS
context_for_next_testing_agent: MiroFish auto-scan integration is live and verified. Cache key 'mirofish_scan_{ticker}' format: {'data': {'signal_type','signal'}, 'ts': datetime}. Frontend selectors: AutoScanner shows strategy chips at .text-[8px] spans; MiroFish chip has class bg-[#00BCD4]/15. STRATEGIES tab in desktop is the 3rd tab in top-right header (Scanner/Strategies/Ghost/Backtest); on smaller viewports there's a separate mobile-panel-right button so use exact selector. Standalone MiroFish RUN SWARM already verified in iteration_4.
